root_text.an5.208:1.3: Acakkhussaṁ, mukhaṁ duggandhaṁ hoti, rasaharaṇiyo na visujjhanti, pittaṁ semhaṁ bhattaṁ pariyonandhati, bhattamassa nacchādeti.
root_text.an5.208:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ādīnavā dantakaṭṭhassa akhādane.
root_text.an5.208:2.3: Cakkhussaṁ, mukhaṁ na duggandhaṁ hoti, rasaharaṇiyo visujjhanti, pittaṁ semhaṁ bhattaṁ na pariyonandhati, bhattamassa chādeti.
root_text.an5.208:2.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ānisaṁsā dantakaṭṭhassa khādane”ti.

translation_text.an5.208:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five drawbacks of not using chew sticks.
translation_text.an5.208:1.3: It’s not good for your eyes, you get bad breath, your taste-buds aren’t cleaned, bile and phlegm cover your food, and you lose your appetite.
translation_text.an5.208:1.4: These are the five drawbacks of not using chew sticks.
translation_text.an5.208:2.1: There are these five benefits of using chew sticks.
translation_text.an5.208:2.3: It’s good for your eyes, you don’t get bad breath, your taste-buds are cleaned, bile and phlegm don’t cover your food, and food agrees with you.
translation_text.an5.208:2.4: These are the five benefits of using chew sticks.”
